description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this trendy top. With excellent styling and a well designed look, this simple top will get the temperatures soaring when paired with a pair of shorts and flat strappy slip ons. Product Details Black top, has long sleeves, boat neckline, loops around the shoulder and tiered ruffles around the neckline Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
